title: 10 best herbal creams for dark lips
description: Taraxacum mongolicum, also known as Mongolian dandelion, creams helps with dark lips because it contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lip tissue, which can contribute to darkening of the lips.
